flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Berea College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (44.6% → 35.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Berea College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.6k → $51.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Berea College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.6k → $51.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Berea College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (65.6% → 58.2%).
